strategies.name: Leakage Detection & Arresting
strategies.description: Install water meters, acoustic leak detection, pressure testing, night-flow analysis. Repair leaks with epoxy coatings + automatic alarms. Reduce system loss from 4% to <1%.

strategies.name: Drainage Water Reuse & Recovery
strategies.description: Create segregated 3-line drainage network. Install 3 isolation tanks (1000 m³ each). Deploy MBR for 200k m³/mo. Recycle 250-340k m³/month previously wasted water.

strategies.name: Hot Effluent Reuse & Heat Recovery
strategies.description: Install Plate Heat Exchangers at 3-4 effluent sources. Cool 75-85°C to 25-30°C. Deploy Submerged MF (0.2 micron) + RO polishing. Expected displacement: 120-150k m³/month.

strategies.name: Bagasse Pulping Optimization
strategies.description: Implement counter-current multi-stage washing. Install rotary vacuum screens. Pre-dry bagasse input. Recirculate 60-70% water. COD-based control. Expected savings: 28-42k m³/mo.

strategies.name: Cooling Water Makeup Reduction
strategies.description: Install real-time conductivity sensor. Increase CoC from 2.0-2.5 → 3.0-3.5. Route RO rejects (40-50k m³/mo) + treated drainage to tower. Displace 35-45k m³/month fresh water.

strategies.name: Domestic Water Reduction & Rainwater Harvesting
strategies.description: 3-Phase approach: (1) Metering + leak repair + fixture upgrades (M1-3), (2) Rainwater harvesting 1000m³ tank + seasonal 12-18k m³/mo (M4-8), (3) Greywater reuse for toilets (M9-12). Total: 250-300k m³/mo reduction.

strategies.name: Paper Machine & Stock Prep Optimization
strategies.description: Felt washing closed-loop (18-25k m³/mo), hot condensate recovery (35-50k m³/mo), broke recycling optimization (12-18k m³/mo), vacuum water recovery (12-20k m³/mo). Advanced closed-loop retrofit: target 90-95% recirculation.

strategies.name: DM Water Plant Loss Reduction
strategies.description: Boiler CoC optimization (25-35k m³/mo), CBD recovery (28-37k m³/mo), DM reject 2-stage RO (30-37.5k m³/mo), regeneration recovery, integrate alternative sources (RWH, treated drainage, PM condensate). Total: 80-120k m³/mo reduction.

strategies.name: Circular Economy & Reuse Strategies
strategies.description: 4-tier cascading model: Tier 1 (DM + condensate to cooling), Tier 2 (filtered drainage to PM/cooling), Tier 3 (MBR-treated effluent to irrigation), Tier 4 (brine to evaporation). Achieve 85%+ wastewater recycling and ZLD certification.
